module_info.docstring:
Security Tests: Path Traversal Prevention.

Tests for path traversal attack prevention:
- File reservation pattern with traversal rejected/warned
- Attachment path traversal blocked
- Archive tree/content path validation
- Agent name with path separators sanitized
- Project slug validation prevents traversal

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-qe7

classes.name: TestAgentNamePathSanitization
classes.docstring: Tests for agent name sanitization against path traversal.

methods.name: test_agent_name_strips_forward_slashes
methods.docstring: Agent names with forward slashes have them stripped.

methods.name: test_agent_name_strips_backslashes
methods.docstring: Agent names with backslashes have them stripped.

methods.name: test_agent_name_strips_dots
methods.docstring: Agent names with dots have them stripped.

methods.name: test_agent_name_path_traversal_empty_result
methods.docstring: Pure path traversal strings return None after sanitization.

methods.name: test_agent_name_only_slashes_returns_none
methods.docstring: Names with only path separators return None.

methods.name: test_agent_name_mixed_separators_stripped
methods.docstring: Mixed path separators are all stripped.

methods.name: test_validate_rejects_path_traversal_name
methods.docstring: validate_agent_name_format rejects path-like names.

methods.name: test_validate_accepts_valid_names
methods.docstring: Valid adjective+noun names are accepted.

classes.name: TestArchivePathTraversal
classes.docstring: Tests for archive tree/content path traversal prevention.

methods.docstring: get_archive_tree rejects paths with parent directory traversal.

methods.docstring: get_archive_tree rejects pure '..' path.

methods.name: test_get_archive_tree_rejects_embedded_traversal
methods.docstring: get_archive_tree rejects paths with embedded /../.

methods.name: test_get_archive_tree_rejects_trailing_dotdot
methods.docstring: get_archive_tree rejects paths ending with /..

methods.name: test_get_archive_tree_rejects_absolute_path
methods.docstring: get_archive_tree rejects absolute paths.

methods.name: test_get_archive_tree_rejects_backslash_traversal
methods.docstring: get_archive_tree rejects Windows-style backslash traversal.

methods.name: test_get_file_content_rejects_parent_traversal
methods.docstring: get_file_content rejects paths with parent directory traversal.

methods.name: test_get_file_content_rejects_dotdot_only
methods.docstring: get_file_content rejects pure '..' path.

methods.name: test_get_file_content_rejects_embedded_traversal
methods.docstring: get_file_content rejects paths with embedded /../.

methods.name: test_get_archive_tree_allows_valid_paths
methods.docstring: get_archive_tree allows legitimate nested paths.

methods.docstring: Project slugs with path traversal are rejected by slugify.

methods.docstring: ensure_project normalizes human_key to safe slug.

methods.docstring: File reservation warns on overly broad patterns.

methods.docstring: File reservation with path traversal pattern is handled.
